metaDescription: Compare Meta Ads, Google Ads and acquisition strategies for businesses in Morocco.

meta-ads-vs-google-ads.title: Meta Ads vs Google Ads: which channel to choose?
meta-ads-vs-google-ads.description: Comparison for businesses in Morocco: cost, intent, timeline and use cases.
meta-ads-vs-google-ads.verdict: Combine both: Meta for volume and awareness, Google for high-intent conversion.

faqs.question: Should I choose only one channel?
faqs.answer: No, the Meta + Google synergy is the most effective strategy for most centers.

faqs.question: Which to prioritize with a small budget?
faqs.answer: Google if your offer is searched for; Meta if you need to create demand.

seo-vs-google-ads.title: SEO vs Google Ads: organic or paid?
seo-vs-google-ads.description: Comparison for businesses in Morocco: timeline, cost, control and how organic search complements paid Google.
seo-vs-google-ads.verdict: Both complement each other: Google Ads for immediacy and message testing; SEO for durable visibility and less paid dependency.

faqs.question: Should I choose between SEO and Google Ads?
faqs.answer: No. Most performing SMEs combine both: Ads for quick leads, SEO to build organic presence.

faqs.question: Does SEO replace Google Ads?
faqs.answer: No. SEO takes time. Google Ads bridges the gap and helps test keywords and landing pages.

faqs.question: Which budget to prioritize at launch?
faqs.answer: If your offer is already searched, start with Google Ads. In parallel, launch an SEO foundation for the medium term.

wordpress-vs-laravel.title: WordPress vs Laravel: which choice for your web project?
wordpress-vs-laravel.description: Compare brochure CMS (WordPress) and custom development (Laravel/Next.js) to qualify your needs in Morocco.
wordpress-vs-laravel.verdict: WordPress suits simple brochure and content sites. Laravel (or Next.js at Mohtaoua) makes sense when the project becomes a real business product with workflows, integrations and scale.

faqs.question: Does Mohtaoua develop in WordPress?
faqs.answer: We favor Next.js for corporate sites and performant platforms. WordPress remains a market reference we compare to help you scope the right project level.

faqs.question: Can I migrate from WordPress to custom?
faqs.answer: Yes. We audit content, SEO and integrations before a progressive migration to preserve traffic and conversions.

faqs.question: How do I know which to choose?
faqs.answer: If you mainly need editorial pages and a blog, a CMS is enough. If you have user roles, APIs, payments or business rules, go custom.

crm-vs-excel.title: CRM vs Excel: why structure your sales follow-up?
crm-vs-excel.description: Understand Excel limits for lead tracking and when to move to a structured CRM.

rows.right: Role-based access, single source of truth

crm-vs-excel.verdict: Excel remains useful for ad-hoc analysis, but a CRM becomes essential when several people manage leads, follow-ups are critical and you need pipeline visibility. Both can coexist: CRM for operations, Excel for occasional exports.

faqs.question: Is Excel bad for managing leads?
faqs.answer: Not when starting very small. It becomes risky as the team grows: missed follow-ups, duplicates, no pipeline view.

faqs.question: When to switch to CRM?
faqs.answer: When you lose opportunities due to poor follow-up, several salespeople are involved, or you run Ads/WhatsApp campaigns with lead volume.

faqs.question: How does Mohtaoua CRM fit?
faqs.answer: Our CRM-data service and CRM solution cover structuring, integrations and automation — beyond a simple spreadsheet.
